items.claim: Axel Solla possesses a high-quality, versatile jab.
items.quote: He's got a good long jab. Works it high. He works it low.

items.claim: Axel Solla has demonstrated high durability in previous fights.
items.quote: Showed his durability, but you can only do so many of those in a career.

items.claim: Axel Solla uses leg attacks as a defensive tool to create space when taken down.
items.quote: he often uses leg attacks to create space.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim has effective takedown defense and punishes opponents for failed attempts.
items.quote: He's got good takedown defense and he makes opponents have to pay for those failed takedowns

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim lacks mental fortitude and tends to break under adversity.
items.quote: he just breaks. He doesn't have the dog in him

items.claim: Thomas Peterson relies on a reckless striking style of tucking his chin and charging forward.
items.quote: he likes to just tuck his chin and charge in.

items.claim: Thomas Peterson's most effective striking weapon is his dirty boxing.
items.quote: His dirty boxing is his best uh weapon on the feet.

items.claim: Valter Walker has poor striking defense.
